description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the image registry.gitlab.com/role_unit/role_unit_containers:build with a docker:dind service and sets DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive, DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay2, and STORAGE_DRIVER=vfs variables. Define a single job named single_debian10 (which runs in the default test stage) that extends a test template. The job executes the shell command `RU_ENV_IMAGE=${CI_JOB_NAME/*_/} tests/bash_unit tests/tests_proxy`. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are configured.
